outcome_contract.why: The site supports three languages but customers have no way to switch. Product pages show images and price but no physical details — customers can't judge what they're buying. Both gaps reduce purchase confidence and block non-English conversion.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Language switcher visible in header on all pages; materials, dimensions, and weight displayed on all PDPs.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: LanguageSwitcher component exists; PDP details section exists
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Need to integrate switcher into Header; data missing for details section
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Verify visual fit of switcher in header

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: PDP hides details section when data missing (graceful degradation)
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Switcher links to homepage, doesn't preserve current path

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: PDP tests exist but mock without materials data
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Add test case with materials populated
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Ensure test mocks include new fields

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: SKU schema already defines optional materials/dimensions/weight
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Operator must supply accurate physical specs

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Data change + small UI addition, instant rollback via revert

open_operator_questions: What are the actual materials, dimensions, and weight for each product?

stage_payload.scope_summary: Two gaps identified during a customer walkthrough of the Caryina storefront: 1. **Language switcher**: The site supports en/de/it but has no UI element allowing customers to switch locale. 2. **Product details**: Product pages lack materials, dimensions, and weight information. The rendering code already exists but the data is missing from products.json.
goals: Add a visible language switcher to the site header
Display materials, dimensions, and weight on every PDP
non_goals: Add new locales beyond the existing en/de/it trio
constraints: Must use existing `@acme/ui/LanguageSwitcher` or adapt it (no new design-system component)
Product data fields must conform to the existing `SKU` Zod schema (`materials`, `dimensions`, `weight`)
assumptions: The operator can provide accurate materials, dimensions, and weight for all 3 products
The existing header has visual space for a language switcher
key_entry_points: `apps/caryina/src/components/Header.tsx` — site header, no language switcher currently

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: Links to homepage only, not current path
